topic: low serving temperature, tannin, and aroma expression
trigger_keywords: temperatura de servicio demasiado baja en un vino tinto estructurado
destaca los taninos y reduce la expresión aromática

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A structured red wine is served at an excessively low temperature.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Low temperature suppresses the volatility of aromatic compounds and increases the prominence of firm tactile sensations.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Aromas become less expressive while tannin and hardness appear more marked.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Aromas become less expressive while tannin and hardness appear more marked.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
